conceptClusters.title: Retrieved rule precedence and whitespace evidence
exitEvidence: Learner parses exact declarations and proves the winning display and sizing values before diagnosing layout.
Learner distinguishes collapsible source whitespace, preserved whitespace, text nodes, and visual gaps before deleting markup.

conceptClusters.title: Element box and line tree behavior
exitEvidence: Learner predicts outer participation, inner formatting, anonymous boxes, line boxes, box suppression, and unchanged document semantics.
Learner tests display:none and display:contents against rendering, focus, interaction, and accessibility evidence in named environments.

conceptClusters.title: Measured box areas and sizing equations
exitEvidence: Learner calculates content, padding, border, and margin edges separately from paint, hit testing, and outer layout space.
Learner predicts content-box and border-box used dimensions including asymmetric edges, zero floors, and over-constrained border boxes.

conceptClusters.title: Adjoining margins and formatting context boundaries
exitEvidence: Learner identifies sibling, parent-child, and empty-box adjoining groups and computes positive and negative collapsed results.
Learner establishes a formatting context only for stated containment intent and verifies its float, margin, and child-layout consequences.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A worked measurement board grows from source and cascade evidence into box-tree, line-fragment, box-area, sizing, collapse, and formatting-context traces.
activityDesigns.startingState: Learner can trace cascade winners and custom values but has not separated element, box, line, paint, hit, and margin geometry.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner explains one changed layout from source through computed display, generated boxes, used dimensions, and adjoining-margin behavior.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback stops at the first incorrect tree, value, geometry, or context decision and withholds downstream results.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Worked guidance reveals one boundary or equation term at a time while reserving the changed result.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss routes to a smaller parallel tree or equation, then returns after an explained correction.

interactions.title: Recover layout declarations
interactions.learnerAction: Read selectors, declarations, shorthands, importance, layers, and source order before collecting exact display and box candidates.
interactions.artifactChange: Board gains a parsed candidate and winning-value ledger.

evidence.observable: Every computed display and box value traces to a valid matching winning declaration.
evidence.changedCase: Insert an invalid shorthand, a user rule, and a higher-layer candidate.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First malformed or losing declaration treated as used layout input.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reparse the smallest rule and rerun cascade stages before layout.

interactions.title: Inspect whitespace fragments
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect source text nodes, collapsed spaces, preserved spaces, anonymous inline boxes, and line fragments between adjacent inline-level boxes.
interactions.artifactChange: Board gains a source-to-line whitespace map.

evidence.observable: Each visible gap traces to text processing or box geometry rather than indentation folklore.
evidence.changedCase: Remove source whitespace, preserve it, wrap a line, and switch one child to block.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First gap attributed to margin without source and fragment evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Expose text nodes and line boxes, then replay changed whitespace processing.

interactions.title: Predict outer and inner display
interactions.learnerAction: Predict sibling participation and descendant formatting for block flow, inline flow, inline flow-root, block flow-root, flex, and grid boxes.
interactions.artifactChange: Board gains an outer-role and inner-formatting comparison.

evidence.observable: Prediction separates principal box outer participation from child formatting context.
evidence.changedCase: Change only outer role, then only inner type, and insert anonymous text.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First display keyword treated as one undifferentiated layout mode.
interactions.correctionRoute: Name outer participation and inner child layout separately for each changed box.

interactions.title: Explain box suppression boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Explain display none, display contents, visually hidden, and offscreen cases across box tree, semantics, focus, interaction, and accessibility evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Board gains a multi-surface presence matrix.

evidence.observable: Explanation does not infer semantics or accessibility solely from a CSS keyword.
evidence.changedCase: Focus a descendant, inspect accessibility exposure, and test an unusual element with contents.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First visual result overgeneralized to semantics or accessibility.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect rendering, DOM, focus, interaction, and accessibility surfaces independently.

interactions.title: Read four box areas
interactions.learnerAction: Read content, padding, border, and margin edges and distinguish layout extent, background paint, border paint, and pointer target evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Board gains labeled edges, paint regions, and hit-test points.

evidence.observable: Every measurement and hit result maps to the correct box area without painting margin.
evidence.changedCase: Increase margin, make padding transparent, thicken border, and test points in each band.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First margin, padding, paint, or hit region conflation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Mark edges from content outward, then retest one point per area.

interactions.title: Predict sizing equations
interactions.learnerAction: Predict content and border dimensions under content-box and border-box with asymmetric padding and borders on both axes.

evidence.observable: Equations assign quantitative size to the correct edge and exclude margin.
evidence.changedCase: Switch box sizing, double one border, and make padding plus border exceed declared size.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First missing edge term or false fixed-border-box assumption.
interactions.correctionRoute: Write named edge equation, floor content at zero, then recompute outer size.

interactions.title: Predict collapsed margins
interactions.learnerAction: Predict sibling, parent-child, and empty-box collapse groups with positive, zero, and negative block-axis margins.
interactions.artifactChange: Board gains adjoining edges, group membership, and arithmetic.

evidence.observable: Only adjoining vertical margins in one block formatting context combine using defined signed arithmetic.
evidence.changedCase: Add a border, line box, negative margin, and nonzero min-height.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First nonadjoining margin included or signed group computed as simple sum.
interactions.correctionRoute: Prove adjacency and context membership before applying collapse arithmetic.

interactions.title: Explain formatting context choice
interactions.learnerAction: Explain why flow-root creates an independent block formatting context and compare its margin and float effects with arbitrary padding or overflow changes.
interactions.artifactChange: Board gains an intent-to-context decision record.

evidence.observable: Choice names desired containment, changed child layout, and rejected side effects rather than masking a gap.
evidence.changedCase: Add a float, remove padding, change overflow, and move the child across context boundary.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First context created accidentally or justified only by current pixels.
interactions.correctionRoute: State containment intent, compare changed evidence, then select the narrowest mechanism.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A repair-cafe service board gains measured display, whitespace, box-area, sizing, collapse, and formatting-context behavior through guided prediction and mutation.
activityDesigns.startingState: Semantic service content works but inline gaps, oversized cards, misleading spacing, collapsed margins, and float containment remain unexplained.
activityDesigns.completionState: Board passes source, geometry, hit, narrow-content, zoom, keyboard, accessibility, and changed-layout checks with a maintenance trace.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names first failed evidence stage and smallest useful inspection, never replacement CSS.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints move from requirement, to tree or equation surface, to one parallel example.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Each failure requires prediction, minimal repair, and different mutation before continuing.

interactions.title: Inventory layout source
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect exact display, width, padding, border, margin, and whitespace sources for every repair-cafe component.
interactions.artifactChange: Workshop gains a source and text-node inventory.

evidence.observable: Inventory distinguishes declarations from source text and records exact owners.
evidence.changedCase: Insert a text node, shorthand override, and invalid declaration.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First unproven source or hidden text node.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect source and parsed rules before changing layout.

interactions.title: Predict winning layout values
interactions.learnerAction: Predict winning display and sizing declarations across normal, important, layered, inline, and reader-origin candidates.

evidence.observable: Each predicted layout input follows complete cascade evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Reorder layers, toggle importance, and add a user declaration.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First layout symptom diagnosed before winner verification.
interactions.correctionRoute: Freeze matching candidates and apply cascade stages again.

interactions.title: Test inline whitespace
interactions.learnerAction: Test indentation, no source space, preserved whitespace, wrapping, and font changes between inline-level service labels.
interactions.artifactChange: Workshop gains whitespace and line-fragment cases.

evidence.observable: Visible gaps track processed text fragments and line layout.
evidence.changedCase: Change white-space processing, line width, font metrics, and child display.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First brittle font-size or comment trick proposed as spacing system.
interactions.correctionRoute: Prove text fragment cause, then choose explicit layout spacing if required.

interactions.title: Repair one declaration source
interactions.learnerAction: Code the smallest rule correction after proving a malformed shorthand or lower-priority declaration caused the measured mismatch.
interactions.artifactChange: Workshop gains one causal source repair.

evidence.observable: Only intended computed value and related geometry change.
evidence.changedCase: Add a higher-priority parallel rule and alter shorthand order.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First broad selector or importance escalation without cause.
interactions.correctionRoute: Repair syntax or precedence at earliest divergence and remeasure.

interactions.title: Predict outer participation
interactions.learnerAction: Predict line participation and block flow when service badges switch among inline, block, inline-block, and flow-root outer roles.
interactions.artifactChange: Workshop gains an outer-role mutation table.

evidence.observable: Predictions identify inline-level versus block-level principal boxes and resulting line boundaries.
evidence.changedCase: Insert sibling text, wrap the line, and switch only outer role.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First child-layout claim confused with outer participation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Ignore descendants and trace principal box in parent formatting context.

interactions.title: Code intended inner formatting
interactions.learnerAction: Code flow or flow-root inner behavior for a status component without changing its semantic element or outer role unnecessarily.
interactions.artifactChange: Component gains explicit child formatting intent.

evidence.observable: Descendants follow intended formatting while sibling participation and semantics remain stable.
evidence.changedCase: Add a float, long text, and a sibling around the component.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First semantic element replacement used to obtain layout.
interactions.correctionRoute: Keep document element, change only proven display dimension, then retest.

interactions.title: Inspect inline flow-root
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect inline-block as inline outer plus flow-root inner behavior including atomic line participation and child containment.
interactions.artifactChange: Workshop gains an inline flow-root evidence row.

evidence.observable: Row separates surrounding inline formatting from internal block formatting.
evidence.changedCase: Insert block child, source space, float, and line wrap.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First claim that inline-block behaves entirely like inline or block.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace outside line role and inside context independently.

interactions.title: Test non-rendered state
interactions.learnerAction: Test display none against rendering, layout gap, focus order, activation, accessible exposure, and restored-state behavior.
interactions.artifactChange: Workshop gains a hidden-state behavior matrix.

evidence.observable: Subtree omission and interaction consequences are verified instead of inferred from pixels.
evidence.changedCase: Focus a child before hiding, restore it, and apply a user override.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First focus or accessibility consequence left unverified.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test each surface and state transition separately.

interactions.title: Explain display contents limits
interactions.learnerAction: Explain box removal, child promotion, unchanged semantics, unusual-element behavior, target support, and accessibility evidence for display contents.
interactions.artifactChange: Workshop gains a bounded contents decision.

evidence.observable: Decision separates specified behavior from named implementation and accessibility observations.
evidence.changedCase: Use an unusual element, inspect focus and accessibility trees, and remove support assumption.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First universal support or semantics claim.
interactions.correctionRoute: Restrict decision to tested element and environment evidence.

interactions.title: Inspect anonymous boxes
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect anonymous block or inline boxes generated around mixed text and child boxes without inventing DOM elements.
interactions.artifactChange: Workshop gains element-tree versus box-tree comparison.

evidence.observable: Generated anonymous structure explains layout while DOM and semantics remain unchanged.
evidence.changedCase: Move text, change child display, and remove the text node.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First anonymous box described as authored semantic markup.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare DOM nodes with generated box tree and redraw only boxes.

interactions.title: Test line fragmentation
interactions.learnerAction: Test inline padding, border, margin, wrapping, bidi content, and unbreakable text across multiple line fragments.

evidence.observable: Fragment boundaries and edge painting match processed inline layout under changed text.
evidence.changedCase: Change language direction, word length, line width, and padding.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First single-rectangle assumption for fragmented inline content.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect each fragment and separate element box from fragment boxes.

interactions.title: Explain chosen display behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Explain why each service component uses its outer and inner display roles while preserving semantics and interaction.

evidence.observable: Each choice cites parent participation, child layout, and changed-state evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Add sibling text, nested content, reader styling, and hidden state.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First display choice justified by keyword habit only.
interactions.correctionRoute: State outer and inner requirements, then revise unsupported choice.

interactions.title: Measure every box area
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect computed content, padding, border, and margin dimensions on asymmetric repair-cafe cards.
interactions.artifactChange: Workshop gains four-edge measurements for each card.

evidence.observable: Measurements distinguish each side and declared, computed, and used evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Change one logical side, border style, and auto margin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First total inferred from shorthand text alone.
interactions.correctionRoute: Expand longhands and measure every used edge.

interactions.title: Predict paint regions
interactions.learnerAction: Predict background and border paint across transparent content, padding, border, and margin test points.

evidence.observable: Predictions exclude transparent margin and distinguish background from border paint.
evidence.changedCase: Change background clipping, border width, and margin color behind element.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First margin described as element-painted area.
interactions.correctionRoute: Mark paint origins and clips, then test one point per band.

interactions.title: Test pointer target geometry
interactions.learnerAction: Test pointer activation at content, padding, border, margin, and neighboring overlap points without relying on visible paint.
interactions.artifactChange: Workshop gains a hit-test map and target-size evidence.

evidence.observable: Activation boundary is observed and margin does not falsely count as target size.
evidence.changedCase: Increase margin, reduce padding, add overlap, and zoom content.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First target-size claim based on margin or screenshot dimensions.
interactions.correctionRoute: Probe points and enlarge real interactive box if required.

interactions.title: Code intentional spacing areas
interactions.learnerAction: Code padding for internal breathing room, border for boundary, and margin for external relationship using measured intent.
interactions.artifactChange: Service cards gain explicit internal and external spacing.

evidence.observable: Each area changes only intended paint, hit, or relationship geometry.
evidence.changedCase: Change background, pointer location, neighbor distance, and border thickness.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First interchangeable padding-margin patch.
interactions.correctionRoute: Name required geometry surface and alter only that area.

interactions.title: Calculate content-box size
interactions.learnerAction: Calculate used content and border dimensions for content-box cards with asymmetric padding and borders.

evidence.observable: Declared quantitative size applies to content edge and outer equation includes both sides.
evidence.changedCase: Change width, one padding edge, and one border edge.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First omitted side or included margin term.
interactions.correctionRoute: Write axis equation with named edges and recompute.

interactions.title: Calculate border-box size
interactions.learnerAction: Calculate content remainder and used border box for border-box cards including zero-floor overflow.

evidence.observable: Padding and border subtract from declared size until zero; unavoidable edges can exceed it.
evidence.changedCase: Make edge sum smaller than, equal to, and greater than declared size.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First negative content size or guaranteed declared outer size claim.
interactions.correctionRoute: Subtract edges, floor content at zero, then sum used border box.

interactions.title: Switch sizing intentionally
interactions.learnerAction: Code border-box only where outer constraint ownership requires it and preserve content space under thicker borders.
interactions.artifactChange: Selected service cards gain explicit sizing model.

evidence.observable: Outer constraint remains stable while content stays usable across edge mutations.
evidence.changedCase: Thicken focus border, enlarge text, and narrow container.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First global sizing reset accepted without changed-content evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare both equations for target component and retain justified scope.

interactions.title: Inspect control defaults
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect native control box-sizing and used dimensions instead of assuming all elements begin as content-box.

evidence.observable: Control equations use observed computed box-sizing and preserve native behavior.
evidence.changedCase: Compare button, text input, generic div, and explicit author override.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First universal default claimed without computed evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect computed value per element, then calculate its actual model.

interactions.title: Test content pressure
interactions.learnerAction: Test long words, translated labels, zoom, intrinsic media, and minimum sizes against both sizing models.

evidence.observable: Failures distinguish box arithmetic from intrinsic or text minimum constraints.
evidence.changedCase: Change language, word break opportunity, zoom, and media intrinsic width.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First overflow blamed on box-sizing alone.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify equation, then inspect content minimum and break behavior separately.

interactions.title: Explain sizing decisions
interactions.learnerAction: Explain declared edge, used content space, outer constraint, and remaining content-pressure risks for each component.
interactions.artifactChange: Workshop gains a sizing maintenance note.

evidence.observable: Every claim includes an equation and changed content result.
evidence.changedCase: Change edge thickness, content length, control type, and container width.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First sizing rule defended by convention only.
interactions.correctionRoute: Attach equation and mutation evidence or remove the claim.

interactions.title: Predict sibling collapse
interactions.learnerAction: Predict adjoining sibling block margins in one formatting context with positive and negative groups.

evidence.observable: Graph proves adjacency and computes maximum positive minus maximum negative magnitude.
evidence.changedCase: Insert inline content, clearance, border, and another negative margin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First nonadjoining edge or simple sum used.
interactions.correctionRoute: Prove group membership before signed arithmetic.

interactions.title: Inspect parent-child collapse
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect first-child top and last-child bottom margins against parent border, padding, height, and min-height conditions.

evidence.observable: Each collapse or separation follows exact edge and in-flow conditions.
evidence.changedCase: Add one-pixel padding, border, line box, min-height, and explicit height.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First parent gap treated as child position without collapse evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Mark separating content and edge conditions, then rebuild group.

interactions.title: Test collapse through empty boxes
interactions.learnerAction: Test top-to-bottom margin collapse through empty in-flow blocks under height, min-height, padding, border, and line-box mutations.

evidence.observable: Tests distinguish truly empty box from whitespace line content and separating geometry.
evidence.changedCase: Add collapsible whitespace, preserved text, min-height, and border.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First empty status inferred from visual blankness.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect line boxes and separating edges before computing group.

interactions.title: Calculate signed collapse
interactions.learnerAction: Calculate multi-margin groups containing only positive, mixed, and only negative values without adding every declaration.

evidence.observable: Result uses maximum positive and maximum absolute negative according to defined arithmetic.
evidence.changedCase: Change sign, magnitude, and group membership of three margins.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First larger-written-value or total-sum shortcut.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate positive and negative sets, then apply collapse formula.

interactions.title: Create intentional flow root
interactions.learnerAction: Code flow-root where independent block formatting and float containment are actual component requirements.
interactions.artifactChange: One component gains explicit formatting-context boundary.

evidence.observable: Boundary contains intended floats and changes child margin relation without altering semantics.
evidence.changedCase: Remove float, add child margin, and place component beside another float.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First flow-root added solely to chase current spacing.
interactions.correctionRoute: State containment need and compare context versus no-context mutations.

interactions.title: Explain overflow side effects
interactions.learnerAction: Explain why overflow other than visible can establish a block formatting context yet may be wrong when clipping or scrolling is unwanted.

evidence.observable: Comparison covers formatting context, overflow behavior, focus visibility, and content mutation.
evidence.changedCase: Add overflowing text, focus outline, positioned decoration, and scroll content.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First overflow hidden used as harmless clearfix.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test overflow consequences and select mechanism matching intent.

interactions.title: Diagnose unexplained spacing
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect a spacing defect by locating adjoining edges and context boundary before choosing margin, padding, border, or flow-root repair.
interactions.artifactChange: Workshop gains a first-divergence repair trace.

evidence.observable: Repair changes intended relationship and survives different content without arbitrary spacer geometry.
evidence.changedCase: Remove child, add negative margin, insert line content, and change parent boundary.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First arbitrary padding patch without collapse diagnosis.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rebuild adjoining group, state intended relation, then choose narrow repair.

interactions.title: Test formatting context boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Test float interaction, child margin collapse, height containment, neighboring flow, and overflow across context mutations.

evidence.observable: Every observed effect is attributed to a specific boundary consequence.
evidence.changedCase: Switch flow-root, inline-block, overflow, and ordinary block flow.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First context mechanism treated as equivalent in all effects.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare same fixture under one boundary change at a time.

interactions.title: Run integrated box mutations
interactions.learnerAction: Test source whitespace, display, area, sizing, margin, float, long content, zoom, keyboard, and accessibility changes together.
interactions.artifactChange: Workshop gains a cumulative behavior suite.

evidence.observable: All retained semantics, interaction, geometry, and context invariants pass under combined change.
evidence.changedCase: Apply all named source, content, input, and geometry mutations in a new order.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First retained invariant broken by integrated repair.
interactions.correctionRoute: Bisect mutations to first divergence and repair causal stage only.

interactions.title: Explain completed box architecture
interactions.learnerAction: Explain source, cascade, text, box-tree, paint, hit, sizing, collapse, and context decisions using changed evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Repair-cafe board gains an evidence-linked maintenance record.

evidence.observable: Every claim identifies source, measurement, mutation, limitation, and rejected alternative.
evidence.changedCase: Add a new service card, translated copy, reader style, thicker focus border, and nested float.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First conclusion without causal or changed-case evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace disputed behavior from source to used result and narrow claim.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A donation-card interface is completed from partial tree and measurement records as support fades.
activityDesigns.startingState: Cards work semantically but contain incomplete display, box, sizing, and margin decisions.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner completes and mutates an unrelated box architecture without workshop recipes.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names failed evidence dimension only after commitment.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Faded hints cue one tree, equation, or context surface and then disappear.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Every miss requires a different parallel result before returning.

interactions.title: Complete source evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Complete missing declaration, cascade, and whitespace rows before changing donation-card layout.

evidence.observable: All layout inputs trace to parsed winning declarations or processed text.
evidence.changedCase: Add shorthand, user rule, and preserved whitespace.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First inferred input lacking source evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reparse and recascade one parallel rule.

interactions.title: Code card outer roles
interactions.learnerAction: Code card and badge outer display roles while preserving intended sibling and line participation.

evidence.observable: Sibling flow and wrapping match requirements under changed text.
evidence.changedCase: Insert sibling text, narrow line, and switch badge role.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First outer role chosen for child layout.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace principal box in parent context.

interactions.title: Complete inner formatting
interactions.learnerAction: Complete partial flow and flow-root decisions for donation-card descendants and float containment.
interactions.artifactChange: Cards gain bounded child formatting contexts.

evidence.observable: Inner behavior changes only intended child layout and containment.
evidence.changedCase: Add float, child margin, and nested block.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First context without stated containment need.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare ordinary flow and flow-root evidence.

interactions.title: Test card presence states
interactions.learnerAction: Test visible, none, and contents states across layout, focus, activation, semantics, and accessibility surfaces.

evidence.observable: Each surface has observed named-environment evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Hide focused child, restore it, and test unusual element contents.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First visual result generalized across surfaces.
interactions.correctionRoute: Retest each presence surface independently.

interactions.title: Complete area measurements
interactions.learnerAction: Complete asymmetric content, padding, border, margin, paint, and hit-test records for donation controls.

evidence.observable: Every edge, paint band, and pointer point is correctly classified.
evidence.changedCase: Increase margin, reduce padding, and thicken border.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First area or hit boundary misclassified.
interactions.correctionRoute: Label edges outward and probe each band.

interactions.title: Code intentional card spacing
interactions.learnerAction: Code internal padding, visible borders, and external margins from explicit relationship and target requirements.

evidence.observable: Each change affects intended paint, hit, or external geometry only.
evidence.changedCase: Change background, pointer point, neighbor, and focus border.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First interchangeable spacing patch.
interactions.correctionRoute: Name required box area before editing.

interactions.title: Complete content-box equations
interactions.learnerAction: Complete missing axis terms for content-box donation cards with asymmetric edges.

evidence.observable: Declared size applies to content and border size includes both edge pairs.
evidence.changedCase: Change one padding, border, and declared dimension.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First omitted or margin equation term.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite named-edge equation and recompute.

interactions.title: Test border-box limits
interactions.learnerAction: Test border-box content remainder, zero floor, edge excess, long content, and zoom on donation actions.

evidence.observable: Tests separate arithmetic excess from content minimum pressure.
evidence.changedCase: Exceed declared size with edges and add unbreakable translated text.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First belief border-box prevents all overflow.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify equation then content constraints.

interactions.title: Complete sibling collapse graph
interactions.learnerAction: Complete adjoining sibling margin groups and signed results for stacked donation sections.

evidence.observable: Only adjoining same-context block margins enter defined arithmetic.
evidence.changedCase: Insert border, line box, and negative margin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First invalid group member or sum shortcut.
interactions.correctionRoute: Prove adjacency then calculate signed group.

interactions.title: Test parent-child collapse
interactions.learnerAction: Test first and last child margin relations across parent padding, borders, min-height, content, and context boundaries.

evidence.observable: Every collapsed or separated group follows exact conditions.
evidence.changedCase: Add one-pixel separator, preserved whitespace, and flow-root.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First blank parent treated as evidence of collapse.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect separating boxes and edges first.

interactions.title: Code needed context boundary
interactions.learnerAction: Code one formatting-context boundary for proven float or margin containment without unwanted clipping.

evidence.observable: Boundary solves stated need and preserves focus and overflow.
evidence.changedCase: Remove float, add focus outline, and overflow long content.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First accidental overflow-based context.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare side effects and choose intent-matching mechanism.

interactions.title: Explain donation box system
interactions.learnerAction: Explain completed source, text, display, area, sizing, collapse, and context choices using mutation evidence.

evidence.observable: Every choice cites causal changed evidence and limits.
evidence.changedCase: Add new card, translated copy, reader style, and nested float.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First unsupported architecture claim.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace disputed behavior and narrow claim.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: Eight unrelated layout incidents receive first-divergence diagnoses and mutation-tested repairs.
activityDesigns.startingState: Symptoms tempt arbitrary spacing patches but include source, text, display, area, sizing, and collapse causes.
activityDesigns.completionState: Every minimal repair passes a different regression case.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reveals failed evidence surface, not defect or patch.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints narrow to tree, equation, or context after prediction.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Repair is accepted only after explanation and a novel mutation passes.

interactions.title: Predict first divergence
interactions.learnerAction: Predict whether wrong spacing begins in rule parsing, cascade, source whitespace, or later geometry.

evidence.observable: Prediction names evidence able to disprove one stage.
evidence.changedCase: Add invalid shorthand, user rule, and text node.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First diagnosis based on screenshot only.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect earliest source evidence before layout.

interactions.title: Inspect phantom inline gap
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect text fragments and inline box edges causing a gap mislabeled as margin.

evidence.observable: Gap changes with processed source text, not margin mutation.
evidence.changedCase: Remove space, preserve it, wrap line, and change font.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First geometry patch before text proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Expose line fragments and retest source change.

interactions.title: Debug wrong display dimension
interactions.learnerAction: Debug a component whose outer role was changed to solve an inner formatting requirement.
interactions.artifactChange: Clinic gains separated outer and inner repair.

evidence.observable: Repair preserves sibling participation while fixing child layout.
evidence.changedCase: Add sibling text, float child, and line wrap.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First replacement display value changing both dimensions.
interactions.correctionRoute: Repair only proven outer or inner role.

interactions.title: Test false target size
interactions.learnerAction: Test a control whose large margin appears accessible but leaves a small interactive border box.

evidence.observable: Repair enlarges actual interactive area without changing neighbor relation accidentally.
evidence.changedCase: Probe margin, padding, border, overlap, and zoom points.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First target claim using margin extent.
interactions.correctionRoute: Map activation points and resize real target box.

interactions.title: Debug oversized border box
interactions.learnerAction: Debug border-box output exceeding declared width because padding and borders cannot fit.

evidence.observable: Repair respects nonnegative content and required edges.
evidence.changedCase: Make edge sum below, equal to, and above width.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First negative content calculation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Floor content at zero then sum used edges.

interactions.title: Inspect escaping child margin
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect a first-child margin collapsing with its parent instead of assuming child offset.

evidence.observable: Diagnosis proves adjoining edges and separator absence.
evidence.changedCase: Add border, padding, line box, and flow-root.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First arbitrary top padding proposal.
interactions.correctionRoute: Establish intended relation then choose causal boundary.

interactions.title: Predict negative collapse repair
interactions.learnerAction: Predict a mixed-sign collapse result before removing the margin blamed for overlap.

evidence.observable: Prediction uses group maxima and correct sign.
evidence.changedCase: Change positive maximum, negative magnitude, and group membership.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First total-sum or largest-written shortcut.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate sign sets then calculate.

interactions.title: Explain context repair
interactions.learnerAction: Explain why flow-root repair is preferable to overflow clipping or arbitrary padding for the clinic case.
interactions.artifactChange: Clinic closes with causal mechanism comparison.

evidence.observable: Explanation covers float, margin, overflow, focus, and changed content.
evidence.changedCase: Remove float, add focus outline, long text, and nested margin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First repair claim lacking side-effect evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare mechanisms under same mutations.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An independent local-market page gains original measured component boxes and stakeholder evidence.
activityDesigns.startingState: Learner receives semantic content, users, constraints, and test environments but no layout recipe.
activityDesigns.completionState: Learner builds, mutates, and defends original display and box architecture.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Lab feedback reports failed acceptance evidence only.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints restate requirement and evidence category without code.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Failure requires causal revision and new mutation.

interactions.title: Build source ledger
interactions.learnerAction: Build declaration, cascade, and whitespace ledger for market navigation, cards, controls, and notices.

evidence.observable: Every planned input has exact source and owner.
evidence.changedCase: Add reader rule, malformed shorthand, and text node.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First unowned or unverified input.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace source before architecture.

interactions.title: Build display architecture
interactions.learnerAction: Build outer and inner display roles for market components without changing semantic elements.

evidence.observable: Sibling and child layout match requirements under mutation.
evidence.changedCase: Add sibling text, nested blocks, float, and wrapping.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First display choice without two-dimensional role evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Specify outer and inner needs separately.

interactions.title: Test market line fragments
interactions.learnerAction: Test source whitespace, preserved copy, wrapping, languages, and inline fragments in market badges.

evidence.observable: Gaps and fragments match processed text evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Change whitespace mode, language, width, and display.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First untested inline gap assumption.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect text and box fragments.

interactions.title: Test presence requirements
interactions.learnerAction: Test non-rendered and contents choices across layout, focus, interaction, and accessibility environments.

evidence.observable: Selected behavior meets explicit presence requirement on every surface.
evidence.changedCase: Hide focused control, restore it, and test unsupported contents behavior.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First surface inferred from pixels.
interactions.correctionRoute: Observe each surface independently.

interactions.title: Build measured box areas
interactions.learnerAction: Build content, padding, border, and margin geometry for cards and controls from paint, target, and relationship requirements.

evidence.observable: Each area serves one documented geometry purpose.
evidence.changedCase: Alter background, pointer point, neighbor, and border.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First interchangeable area use.
interactions.correctionRoute: Map requirement to exact edge.

interactions.title: Test interactive geometry
interactions.learnerAction: Test pointer and keyboard controls with zoom, overlap, reduced padding, and increased margin.
interactions.artifactChange: Market gains target and focus geometry evidence.

evidence.observable: Actual interactive border boxes remain usable and focus visible.
evidence.changedCase: Probe all bands, overlap neighbor, and zoom text.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First margin counted as target.
interactions.correctionRoute: Measure active boundary and repair real box.

interactions.title: Build sizing equations
interactions.learnerAction: Build content-box or border-box contracts per market component with explicit used-size equations.

evidence.observable: Declared edge and used content space match each requirement.
evidence.changedCase: Thicken borders, narrow container, and switch model.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First convention-only sizing choice.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare both equations and retain evidence-backed model.

interactions.title: Test content pressure
interactions.learnerAction: Test long market names, translations, intrinsic media, zoom, and oversized edges against sizing contracts.

evidence.observable: Arithmetic and intrinsic-content failures are correctly separated.
evidence.changedCase: Change language, word breaks, media size, and edge sum.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First overflow misdiagnosis.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify equation then intrinsic constraint.

interactions.title: Build spacing relationships
interactions.learnerAction: Build block-axis spacing with explicit sibling and parent-child collapse predictions instead of spacer patches.

evidence.observable: Every gap has adjoining-edge and signed arithmetic evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Add border, empty box, negative margin, and line content.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First unexplained visual gap.
interactions.correctionRoute: Graph margins before changing values.

interactions.title: Build context boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Build formatting-context boundaries only for proven market float or margin containment needs.

evidence.observable: Boundary meets need without unwanted clipping or semantic change.
evidence.changedCase: Remove float, add overflow, focus outline, and child margin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First accidental context mechanism.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare boundary side effects.

interactions.title: Test complete market flow
interactions.learnerAction: Test combined source, display, text, area, sizing, collapse, zoom, input, and accessibility mutations.

evidence.observable: All retained behavior survives combined mutations.
evidence.changedCase: Apply all mutation categories in a new sequence.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First regression hidden by isolated checks.
interactions.correctionRoute: Bisect to first divergence.

interactions.title: Defend market box system
interactions.learnerAction: Defend display, box, sizing, spacing, context, semantics, and accessibility decisions to market stakeholders.
interactions.artifactChange: Market closes with architecture decision record.

evidence.observable: Defense ties decisions to changed evidence, tradeoffs, and limits.
evidence.changedCase: Add new vendor card, reader rule, translation, thicker focus, and float.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First claim beyond evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Bind claim to tested result or revise.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A delayed casebook retrieves all seven concepts from unfamiliar source and geometry.
activityDesigns.startingState: Learner receives new rules, text, trees, measurements, and contexts without prior answers.
activityDesigns.completionState: Misses are corrected on different cases and rescheduled.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names first missing category after commitment.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints cue one surface then a smaller case.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Every miss requires causal correction on a different parallel case.

interactions.title: Retrieve rule inputs
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve rule boundaries and cascade order for unfamiliar display and sizing candidates.

evidence.observable: All used values have exact winning source.
evidence.changedCase: Add invalid shorthand, layer, and user rule.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First unverified computed input.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reparse and recascade a new set.

interactions.title: Predict whitespace fragments
interactions.learnerAction: Predict collapsed and preserved source whitespace through changed inline line fragments.

evidence.observable: Visible space follows text processing and wrapping.
evidence.changedCase: Change white-space, width, and display.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First margin-only gap explanation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Expose text nodes and lines.

interactions.title: Retrieve display roles
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve outer and inner meanings for block, inline, flow-root, inline-block, flex, grid, none, and contents.

evidence.observable: Roles separate parent participation, child layout, and box generation.
evidence.changedCase: Switch only one dimension and add text.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First fused display model.
interactions.correctionRoute: Name outer and inner separately.

interactions.title: Correct presence overclaim
interactions.learnerAction: Correct a claim that box-tree removal always determines semantics, focus, and accessibility identically.

evidence.observable: Correction uses independent named-environment evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Test none, contents, focused child, and unusual element.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First visual-to-accessibility inference.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect each surface independently before correcting the claim.

interactions.title: Retrieve area boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve content, padding, border, margin, paint, hit, and layout-space distinctions.

evidence.observable: Every point and edge is classified correctly.
evidence.changedCase: Alter each area and probe points.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First box-area boundary conflation.
interactions.correctionRoute: Label every edge outward before classifying points.

interactions.title: Explain paint and hit behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Explain why margin supplies spacing but neither element background paint nor reliable pointer target.

evidence.observable: Explanation cites point tests and box edges.
evidence.changedCase: Increase margin, reduce padding, and overlap neighbor.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First margin target claim.
interactions.correctionRoute: Probe real activation boundary.

interactions.title: Predict content-box equation
interactions.learnerAction: Predict content and border dimensions from asymmetric content-box declarations.

evidence.observable: Equation assigns declared size to content edge.
evidence.changedCase: Change three asymmetric edge terms.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First missing side or margin term.
interactions.correctionRoute: Write named-axis equation and recompute all edges.

interactions.title: Correct border-box guarantee
interactions.learnerAction: Correct a claim that border-box can never exceed declared size or overflow content.

evidence.observable: Correction covers edge excess and intrinsic pressure.
evidence.changedCase: Exceed width with edges and long word.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First false containment guarantee.
interactions.correctionRoute: Floor content then inspect minimum.

interactions.title: Retrieve collapse conditions
interactions.learnerAction: Retrieve adjoining sibling, parent-child, and empty-box conditions plus exceptions.

evidence.observable: Only exact same-context adjoining margins qualify.
evidence.changedCase: Add border, line, clearance, height, and context.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First missing adjacency condition.
interactions.correctionRoute: Prove checklist on new graph.

interactions.title: Predict signed collapse
interactions.learnerAction: Predict mixed positive and negative collapsed groups without simple addition.

evidence.observable: Result uses positive maximum minus negative magnitude maximum.
evidence.changedCase: Change signs and group membership.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First arithmetic shortcut.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate signs and recompute.

interactions.title: Explain context boundary
interactions.learnerAction: Explain flow-root, inline-block, and overflow context effects and choose one for unfamiliar containment need.

evidence.observable: Choice covers float, margin, overflow, focus, and semantics.
evidence.changedCase: Remove float, add focus, overflow, and child margin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First accidental side effect omitted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare mechanisms under same changes.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: Independent checkpoint produces answers, code, debugging, and defenses on novel box cases.
activityDesigns.startingState: Learner receives unfamiliar source and requirements without prior artifacts or hints.
activityDesigns.completionState: All seven concepts pass changed-case server-side evidence or route to new form.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Assessment reports categories only after submission.
activityDesigns.hintContract: No assessment hints, answer reveal, or prior artifacts are available.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: Failure routes to prerequisite retrieval and novel reassessment.

interactions.title: Answer layout provenance
interactions.learnerAction: Answer exact winning display and box declarations and processed whitespace inputs.

evidence.observable: Every input has exact causal source.
evidence.changedCase: Add invalid rule, user importance, and text node.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Source provenance invariant.
interactions.correctionRoute: Retrieve then answer new source.

interactions.title: Code outer and inner roles
interactions.learnerAction: Code display behavior meeting separate sibling and descendant requirements without semantic replacement.

evidence.observable: Outer and inner results pass changed tree cases.
evidence.changedCase: Add sibling text, float child, and line wrap.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Outer and inner display-role invariant.
interactions.correctionRoute: Retrieve roles then code new component.

interactions.title: Debug inline fragment gap
interactions.learnerAction: Debug a gap caused by processed whitespace and line fragments without brittle font tricks.

evidence.observable: Repair follows explicit spacing intent under wrap and font change.
evidence.changedCase: Change whitespace, font, width, and display.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Whitespace-fragment invariant.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect lines then debug new case.

interactions.title: Defend presence mechanism
interactions.learnerAction: Defend none, contents, or another presence mechanism using layout, focus, interaction, and accessibility evidence.

evidence.observable: Defense separates semantics and named environment behavior.
evidence.changedCase: Focus descendant, restore state, and change element type.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Presence evidence invariant.
interactions.correctionRoute: Review surfaces then defend new case.

interactions.title: Answer area measurements
interactions.learnerAction: Answer content, padding, border, margin, paint, hit, and outer-space measurements.

evidence.observable: Every edge and point is correct.
evidence.changedCase: Change asymmetric edges and probe locations.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Complete box-area measurement invariant.
interactions.correctionRoute: Relabel edges then answer new box.

interactions.title: Code usable target geometry
interactions.learnerAction: Code internal and external spacing that meets target and neighbor requirements without counting margin.

evidence.observable: Pointer and keyboard evidence survives overlap and zoom.
evidence.changedCase: Reduce padding, increase margin, overlap neighbor, and zoom.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Target geometry invariant.
interactions.correctionRoute: Measure active box then code new control.

interactions.title: Answer sizing equations
interactions.learnerAction: Answer content-box and border-box used dimensions with asymmetric and over-constrained edges.

evidence.observable: Equations include zero floor and exclude margin.
evidence.changedCase: Change model, sides, and edge sum.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Sizing equation invariant.
interactions.correctionRoute: Review named edges then answer new values.

interactions.title: Debug sizing overflow
interactions.learnerAction: Debug overflow by separating box arithmetic from intrinsic media, text minimum, or break behavior.

evidence.observable: Repair addresses first failing constraint and survives content changes.
evidence.changedCase: Translate text, zoom, change media, and thicken border.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Overflow diagnosis invariant.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify equation then inspect minimum.

interactions.title: Answer collapse groups
interactions.learnerAction: Answer sibling, parent-child, empty-box, and signed margin groups in a novel tree.

evidence.observable: Membership and arithmetic follow exact conditions.
evidence.changedCase: Add border, content, negative margin, and context.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Margin-collapse grouping invariant.
interactions.correctionRoute: Review adjacency then answer new graph.

interactions.title: Debug spacing collapse
interactions.learnerAction: Debug an apparent parent offset and implement minimal relationship-correct repair.

evidence.observable: Repair follows intended relationship and changed content.
evidence.changedCase: Remove child, add line, border, and negative margin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Collapse repair invariant.
interactions.correctionRoute: Graph first then debug new tree.

interactions.title: Code context boundary
interactions.learnerAction: Code a formatting-context boundary for stated float or margin containment without unwanted clipping.

evidence.observable: Boundary passes float, margin, overflow, and focus mutations.
evidence.changedCase: Remove float, overflow text, add focus, and child margin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Context side-effect invariant.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare mechanisms then code new case.

interactions.title: Defend complete box architecture
interactions.learnerAction: Defend source, text, display, areas, sizing, collapse, context, semantics, and accessibility for a novel interface.

evidence.observable: Defense ties every choice to causal mutation evidence and limits.
evidence.changedCase: Add translation, reader style, thicker focus, inline text, and nested float.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Integrated transfer invariant.
interactions.correctionRoute: Return to first failed gate then defend new architecture.

authorshipBoundary.interpretation: This file fixes evidence, sequence, interaction, feedback, and correction requirements only; learner-facing explanations, fixtures, checks, answers, and responsive workspace behavior remain unauthored and unpublished.

gaps: Independent subject, instructional-design, assessment, accessibility, safety, and duplication reviews have not accepted this step architecture.
Learner-facing copy, source fixtures, canonical server-side checks, persisted correction scheduling, cross-browser and assistive-technology evidence, and learner pilots do not yet exist.
